data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies user choice to improve decision time.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu options, Focused content presentation.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes navigation elements for faster interaction.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: Groups related elements to aid in visual processing.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes aesthetics to enhance perceived usability.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design for user behavior learned from other sites.
